ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the material (e.g., Ti, Ni, Cu, Fe, Pd) */,
  "pettifor_scale" REAL /* Pettifor chemical scale value */,
  "atomic_radius" REAL /* Atomic radius of the material */,
  "metallic_radius" REAL /* Metallic radius of the material */,
  "electro_negativity" REAL /* Pauling electro-negativity value */,
  "valence_electron_num" REAL /* Valence electron number */,
  "pseudo_potential_radius" REAL /* Pseudo-potential radius */,
  "delta_t" REAL /* Delta T value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the material was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the composition belongs to */,
  "element" TEXT /* Element in the composition (e.g., Ti, Ni, Cu, Fe, Pd) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the element in the composition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the composition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the composition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compositions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., administrator, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., atomic radius, metallic radius) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_properties_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the property type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the property type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions_data" (
  "version_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version data */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the data belongs to */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the data belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version data was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES material_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher in the collaboration */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was established */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the publication is related to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published the material */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the publication was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the data visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the report is related to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
